chief_complaint: Two cases of deceased men with a history of diabetes, one 57 years old with chronic alcohol abuse and the other 75 years old with a history of insulin withdrawal.
history: Case 1: 57-year-old man with a known history of mellitus diabetes and chronic alcohol abuse. Case 2: 75-year-old diabetic man with a history of prolonged insulin deprivation.
exam: Postmortem examination with genital mutilations in Case 1 and neglected state in Case 2.
labs: Elevated beta-hydroxybutyrate (BHB) concentrations in femoral blood and vitreous humor, elevated vitreous glucose, creatinine, and blood HbA1c.
